approach: 1. Used akshare library to fetch ChiNext (创业板) stock list (938 stocks starting with 300). 2. For each stock, retrieved ~40 trading days of historical closing prices ending on 2024-10-31. 3. Calculated 14-day RSI using Wilder's smoothing method: RS = avg_gain / avg_loss, RSI = 100 - 100/(1+RS). 4. Counted days with RSI > 70 in the most recent 20 trading days. 5. Sorted all stocks by overbought days in descending order and selected top 3. Successfully analyzed 250 stocks, found 248 with overbought periods.
assumptions: 1. Used qfq (前复权) adjusted prices for accurate RSI calculation across stock splits/dividends. 2. RSI period = 14 days (standard), requiring 14 additional days for warm-up calculation. 3. Overbought threshold = RSI > 70 (standard technical analysis definition). 4. Analysis window = exactly 20 trading days before 2024-10-31. 5. Network issues with some stocks were handled gracefully (250/938 successful fetches). 6. Wilder's smoothing method used for RSI calculation as specified in task.
